_comment: Optional overrides for tools/import-docs.mjs. Copy to seed-map.json and edit.
Point import-docs.mjs at your local docs.urbit.org checkout; `src` is relative
to the <md-dir-or-file> argument. Omit this file to auto-import every *.md in a
directory (id = filename slug, title from frontmatter/first heading).
Set include:false to skip an entry; order here is the notebook order.
